attributes.action: Don't buy into Trumps "Board of Peace"
attributes.additional_details: After raising taxes and NI on businesses and people, it would be extremely disrespectful to use that money to line the pockets of the US and a multi billionaire -especially given the presidents bullying and browbeating mission on allies. He has shown contempt and disregard for nations and their people, and we should not be suckered into a man hellbent on trying to be president of Earth!
attributes.background: If we cannot adequately fund out own public and health services, we should immediately and unequivocally decline the offer to the sham "Board of Peace" being set up by Trump. Not only should we not pay $1bn to join, Trump would have overarching power...making it a sham anyway.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758144
